news.title: Digital Realty's Q4 Core FFO & Revenues Top Estimates, Rentals Rise
news.summary: DLR beats Q4 estimates as FFO rises 7.5% year over year, revenues jump 13.8%, and leasing momentum drives higher rental rates across its data centers.

news.title: Digital Realty (DLR) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
news.summary: Jordan Sadler: Thank you, operator, and welcome, everyone, to Digital Realty Trust, Inc.'s fourth quarter 2025 earnings conference call.  Joining me on today's call are President and CEO, Andrew P. Power, and CFO, Matthew R. Mercier.  Chief Investment Officer, Gregory Wright, Chief Technology Officer, Christopher Sharp, and Chief Revenue Officer, Colin McLean, are also on the call and will be available for Q&A. Management will be making forward-looking statements, including guidance and underlying assumptions on today's call.

news.title: Digital Realty Trust Proves AI Growth Remains Robust - Reiterate Buy
news.summary: Digital Realty Trust reports record backlogs, high FY2026 FFO guidance, and a 22.69x price/FFO with dividend potential. Find out why DLR stock is a buy.

news.title: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Digital Realty Trust, Lowers Price Target to $190
news.summary: Citigroup  analyst Michael Rollins   maintains Digital Realty Trust (NYSE:DLR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $212 to $190.
